response.body: {"recipe":{"title":"Pizza Margherita in 4 easy steps","ingredients":["300g flour","1tsp yeast","salt","olive oil","200ml water","tomato sauce","basil","1 garlic clove","130g mozzarella cheese","parmesan cheese","100g cherry tomatoes"],"steps":["To make the base, mix flour, yeast, and salt. Add 200ml warm water and olive oil to form a soft dough. Knead for 5 minutes until smooth and set aside.","For the sauce, mix the passata, basil, and crushed garlic, then season to taste.","Divide the dough into two balls. On a floured surface, roll each ball into a large, thin round (about 25cm across) and place on floured baking sheets.","Preheat the oven to 240°C. Smooth the sauce over the bases, then scatter with cheese and tomatoes. Drizzle with olive oil and season.","Bake each pizza on a preheated baking sheet for 8-10 minutes until crisp. Serve with fresh basil leaves if desired."],"image_url":"https://example.com/bd6dc1ac","nutrition":{"calories":1773,"carbohydrates_grams":244,"protein_grams":70,"fat_grams":52},"portions":{"from":0,"to":0},"kg_token":"kg_877d492c"}}
